items.description: claude-mem fork with cmem-sync (cross-machine sync via self-hosted cmem-server), 31-language UI, soft-delete + trash, public registration page. Pairs with bjarne56/cmem-server.

items.name: NewsPulse
items.description: NewsPulse is an Android app for personalized news—topics, interests, saved articles, reading history, and article detail in a layered UI.

items.description: Localhost OpenAI-compatible HTTP proxy that uses your ChatGPT subscription via OAuth — including image generation (gpt-image-2).

items.name: cmem-server
items.description: Self-hosted sync server for claude-mem-plus. Single Rust binary, SQLite, JWT, admin web. Cross-machine memory sync + project sharing for Claude Code.

items.name: Diabetes-Analysis
items.description: End-to-end diabetes risk analysis on CDC BRFSS dataset (70,000+ US respondents). Six ML algorithms compared — Random Forest, XGBoost, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, KNN, SVM. 19 outputs generated automatically including ROC curves, feature importance, and population health dashboard.
